form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by 0.8 lengths in 28.83, beating Akina Sari. Last start finished 4th on March 29 over 510m at this track behind Lakeview Liam beaten 3.5 lengths (29.13) in a Grade 4/5. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 525m at The Meadows beaten 6 lengths (30.61) behind Prison Break in a Grade 5 on March 28. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.
